suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for tests that mutate process-global environment variables (e.g., XDG_*): require serialization/mutex patterns and restoration discipline to avoid parallel-test race conditions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-scrutiny-test-quality-issues review noted `unsafe` `std::env::set_var("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", ...)` usage in config roundtrip tests with potential parallel-test race surface.
